scenarios.name: a settled bet is frozen: its owner can no longer edit the outcome or delete it

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_bet_book__bets (id, title, status, outcome_summary, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('b1', 'Rain by Friday', 'open', 'undecided', ?, '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
UPDATE app_bet_book__bets SET title = 'Rain by Saturday' WHERE id = 'b1'
SELECT title FROM app_bet_book__bets WHERE id = 'b1'
UPDATE app_bet_book__bets SET status = 'settled', resolved_at = '2026-01-05T00:00:00Z' WHERE id = 'b1'
UPDATE app_bet_book__bets SET outcome_summary = 'I won, obviously' WHERE id = 'b1'
SELECT outcome_summary FROM app_bet_book__bets WHERE id = 'b1'
SELECT id FROM app_bet_book__bets WHERE id = 'b1'

scenarios.name: the endpoint_only participants table rejects direct app inserts

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_bet_book__bets (id, title, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('b1', 'Who does dishes', 'open', ?, '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
INSERT INTO app_bet_book__participants (id, bet_id, member_name, side_label, prediction, created_at) VALUES ('p1', 'b1', 'Me', 'yes', 'I will win', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
